name: indian-stock-monitor
description: Institutional-grade daily watchdog for Indian equity holdings (NSE/BSE). Built on 20 years of Indian market pattern recognition. Silent by default — surfaces only Sev-1 critical events: promoter pledge liquidation, governance collapse, cash flow manipulation, surveillance moves, earnings shocks, institutional exodus. Deep quarterly analysis with segment-level drilldown and management credibility tracking.
author: daveanandraj
disclaimer: Informational only. NOT investment advice. The author is not a SEBI-registered investment advisor. Stock investments are subject to market risk.
